positive: A collection of three kawaii-style animals (a sleepy sloth, a round bear, and a pastel bunny) nestled together in a cloud of stars and tiny hearts. Minimalist, soft pastel color palette, clean outlines, sticker sheet style, flat design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, complex background
